message:
fix: resolve CI release failures by updating dependencies

- Remove test hook from GoReleaser config (tests run separately in CI)
- Add oras CLI installation step to CI workflow
- Pull required Docker images for E2E tests in CI
- Ensure all test dependencies are available in GitHub Actions

This fixes the v1.2.0 release failure caused by missing oras dependency.

files.patch:
@@ -19,6 +19,20 @@ jobs:
         with:
           go-version: '1.23'
 
+      - name: Install oras for OCI feature tests
+        run: |
+          curl -LO https://github.com/oras-project/oras/releases/download/v1.3.0/oras_1.3.0_linux_amd64.tar.gz
+          tar -xzf oras_1.3.0_linux_amd64.tar.gz
+          sudo mv oras /usr/local/bin/
+          oras version
+
+      - name: Pull required Docker images for tests
+        run: |
+          docker pull mcr.microsoft.com/devcontainers/base:ubuntu
+          docker pull node:18
+          docker pull ubuntu:22.04
+          docker pull alpine:latest
+
       - name: Run tests
         run: make test

@@ -7,8 +7,8 @@ before:
   hooks:
     # Ensure dependencies are up to date
     - go mod tidy
-    # Run tests before building
-    - go test ./...
+    # Note: Tests are run separately in CI workflow
+    # Skipping tests here since release environment may not have oras/docker dependencies
 
 builds:
   - main: ./main.go
